text.title: Rails ActiveRecord Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — direct AR scopes + thin controllers fit small apps

branch.question: Hot path (AR > 30% request time or N+1 detected)?

conclusion.verdict: extract Query Object on relation; chain methods return self; results return relation
switch to find_each / in_batches; project narrow columns when possible
replace default_scope with named scope before further refactoring
apply remaining rules — Prosopite/Bullet gate in CI + eager-load at boundary

text.example: size=growing → hot_path=false → bulk_iteration=true → find-each-for-bulk → User.find_each(batch_size: 5000) { ... } + narrow columns.
